case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER VS. KEVIN SHELTON

docket_entries.description: COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $944.69 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SHELTON, KEVIN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER  & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHELTON, KEVIN $1,913.50 PRINCIPAL, $944.69 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,858.19

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS.-SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER  & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHELTON, KEVIN $1,843.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,913.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
